description: Held-out PaperWritingBench-style sample package for the multi-agent manuscript system that shifts emphasis from opening-response claims to model calibration and ranking evidence later in Results.
notes: This is a tracked held-out sample package, not an official PaperWritingBench release.
The held-out case exercises a different real claim id so the benchmark matrix covers more than the opening response-kinetics path.

cases.description: A held-out PaperWritingBench-style case should propagate a calibration-focused story into the Results section without relying on the original response-kinetics demo fixture.

checks.label: topic
checks.actual: Calibration-aware foundation model ranking for imbalanced disease states
checks.expected: Calibration-aware foundation model ranking for imbalanced disease states

checks.label: results_section_note_contains
checks.actual: Lead the mid-results narrative with the calibration-quality comparison.

checks.label: claim_calibration_loss_mainly_affects_probability_quality_claim_packet_note_contains

idea_summary.title: Calibration-aware foundation model ranking for imbalanced disease states
idea_summary.objective: Use the model-comparison subsection to foreground probability quality before the broader ranking synthesis.

source_materials.experimental_log:
The held-out benchmark case emphasizes comparative model behavior under class imbalance.
Keep the Results narrative focused on calibration quality before summarizing global ranking.
source_materials.guidelines:
Prioritize the calibration-focused evidence before broader synthesis claims.
Avoid rewriting the opening response-kinetics framing from the original demo bundle.

cases.description: The held-out PaperWritingBench-style path should preserve the same guardrail behavior when its mapping points to a claim id that does not exist in the repo.

checks.label: expected_error_contains
checks.actual: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo_calibration. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

metrics.error_message: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo_calibration. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

idea_summary.title: Held-out calibration guardrail case
idea_summary.objective: Preserve the unknown-claim stop condition even when the package otherwise looks valid.

source_materials.experimental_log: This negative case mirrors a real pre-writing package shape but points to an invalid claim id.
source_materials.guidelines: The importer and benchmark adapter should accept the package shape but the manuscript system must still block generation on the invalid claim reference.
